Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(************************************************************************************

 Properties of local equivalences

 In this file, we enumerate several properties of local equivalences.

 Every pseudofunctor `F` gives rise to a functor `x --> y ⟶ F x --> F y`. If `F` is
 a local equivalence, then we also have a functor in the converse direction. For this
 action we also construct analogous pseudofunctoriality actions, namely an identitor
 and a compositor that witness the preservation of the identity and composition of
 1-cells. We also prove the usual pseudofunctoriality laws together with several
 variations of them.

 Contents
 1. Action on 1-cells and 2-cells
 2. Unit and counit
 3. Functoriality of the action on 2-cells
 4. Action on invertible 2-cells
 5. Identitor and compositor
 6. Pseudofunctor laws

 ************************************************************************************)
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Equivalences.FullyFaithful.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Display.PseudoFunctorBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.PseudoFunctor.
Import PseudoFunctor.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.PseudoFunctors.Properties.

Local Open Scope bicategory_scope.
Local Open Scope cat.

Section LocalEquivalencePseudoFunctoriality.
  Context {B₁ B₂ : bicat}
          {HB₁ : is_univalent_2_1 B₁}
          {HB₂ : is_univalent_2_1 B₂}
          {F : psfunctor B₁ B₂}
          (HF : local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F).

  (** * 1. Action on 1-cells and 2-cells *)
  Definition local_equivalence_inv_onecell
             {x y : B₁}
             (f : F x --> F y)
    : x --> y
    := local_equivalence_right_adjoint HF x y f.

  Definition local_equivalence_inv_twocell
             {x y : B₁}
             {f g : F x --> F y}
             (τ : f ==> g)
    : local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      ==>
      local_equivalence_inv_onecell g
    := #(local_equivalence_right_adjoint HF x y) τ.

  (** * 2. Unit and counit *)
  Definition local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
             {x y : B₁}
             (f : x --> y)
    : invertible_2cell f (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (#F f))
    := z_iso_to_inv2cell (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (local_equivalence_unit HF x y) f).

  Definition local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
             {x y : B₁}
             (f : F x --> F y)
    : invertible_2cell (#F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) f
    := z_iso_to_inv2cell (nat_z_iso_pointwise_z_iso (local_equivalence_counit HF x y) f).

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
τ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g =
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
τ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g =
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ)

    exact (nat_trans_ax (local_equivalence_unit HF x y) _ _ τ).
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ) =
((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f) ^-1 • τ)
• local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g

is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f) ^-1
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
?Hε ^-1 • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ) =
τ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g

is_invertible_2cell

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂

(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f)) ^-1
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ) =
τ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

x, y: B₁

τ: f ==> g
left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ) =
τ • left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) g

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

τ: f ==> g
τ • left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) g =
left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ)

    apply local_equivalence_unit_natural.
  Qed.

• left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y)) g =

(((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
  • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) • τ)
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1 =

f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
(id₂ f • τ)
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1 =
τ • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1

f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
τ • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1 =
τ • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f)
• local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (internal_triangle1 (HF x y)) f: ((((linvunitor (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂)
    • (left_adjoint_unit (HF x y)
       ▹ Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂))
   • rassociator (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y))
       (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂))
  • (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂
     ◃ left_adjoint_counit (HF x y)))
 • runitor (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂)) f =
id₂ (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂) f
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f)
• local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (internal_triangle1 (pr12 (HF x y))) f: (((id₂ (# F f)
   • ## F
       (pr1 (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y))) f))
  • id₂
      (# F
         (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
            (pr1 (HF x y)) (# F f))))
 • pr1 (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y)))
     (# F f)) • id₂ (# F f) = id₂ (# F f)
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f)
• local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: ## F (pr1 (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y))) f)
• pr1 (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y))) (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f)
• local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

    exact p.
  Qed.

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f)) ^-1
• ## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f) ^-1 =
id₂ (# F f)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f)) ^-1
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f) ^-1 =
?Hε ^-1 • id₂ (# F f)

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f)) ^-1

      is_iso.

is_invertible_2cell
  (## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f) ^-1)

      exact (psfunctor_is_iso
               F
               (inv_of_invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f))).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (# F f) =
(psfunctor_is_iso F
   (inv_of_invertible_2cell
      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f))) ^-1

     (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F f))) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
id₂ (# F f) =
## F (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) f)
• left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y)) (# F f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

f: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
## F (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)) f)
• left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y)) (# F f) =
id₂ (# F f)

    apply local_equivalence_triangle1.
  Qed.

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell
    (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell

id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (internal_triangle2 (HF x y)) f: ((((rinvunitor
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y))
    • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y)
       ◃ left_adjoint_unit (HF x y)))
   • lassociator
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y))
       (Fmor_univ F x y HB₁ HB₂)
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y)))
  • (left_adjoint_counit (HF x y)
     ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y)))
 • lunitor (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y)))
  f = id₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (HF x y)) f
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell
    (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
p:= nat_trans_eq_pointwise
  (internal_triangle2 (pr12 (HF x y))) f: (((id₂
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y)) f)
   • pr1 (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)))
       (pr1
          (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
             (pr1 (HF x y))) f))
  • id₂
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y))
         (# F
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
               (pr1 (HF x y)) f))))
 • # (pr1
        (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y))))
     (pr1 (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y))) f))
• id₂
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y)) f) =
id₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y)) f)
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell
    (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
p: pr1 (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 (HF x y)))
  (pr1 (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y)))
     f)
• # (pr1
       (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y))))
    (pr1 (left_adjoint_counit (pr1 (HF x y))) f) =
id₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint (pr1 (HF x y)) f)
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell
    (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    exact p.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
(local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) ^-1

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
(local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
(local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) ^-1
• id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))) ^-1
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell
    (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    apply local_equivalence_triangle2.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. Functoriality of the action on 2-cells *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (id₂ f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (id₂ f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    exact (functor_id (local_equivalence_right_adjoint HF x y) f).
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g, h: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
θ: g ==> h
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ • θ) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell θ

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g, h: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f ==> g
θ: g ==> h
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ • θ) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell θ

    exact (functor_comp (local_equivalence_right_adjoint HF x y) τ θ).
  Qed.

  (** * 4. Action on invertible 2-cells *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_onecell f ==>
local_equivalence_inv_onecell g
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_onecell f ==>
local_equivalence_inv_onecell g
 exact (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)
 
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_onecell g ==>
local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ • ?φ =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
?φ • local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_onecell g ==>
local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
 exact (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ^-1).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ ^-1 =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
 abstract
          (rewrite <- local_equivalence_inv_twocell_comp ;
           rewrite vcomp_rinv ;
           apply local_equivalence_inv_twocell_id).
      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ ^-1
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
 abstract
          (rewrite <- local_equivalence_inv_twocell_comp ;
           rewrite vcomp_linv ;
           apply local_equivalence_inv_twocell_id).
  Defined.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)) ^-1 =
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)) ^-1 =
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
(local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell
   (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• (local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell
     (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
• (is_invertible_2cell_inv
     (local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f))) ^-1 =
id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

    apply local_equivalence_triangle2.
  Qed.

  (** * 5. Identitor and compositor *)
  Definition local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id
             (x : B₁)
    : invertible_2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F x)))
        (id₁ x)
    := comp_of_invertible_2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_inv2cell (psfunctor_id F x))
         (inv_of_invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ x))).

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (f · g))
  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

   · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)).
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
invertible_2cell g
  (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
 exact (inv_of_invertible_2cell (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)).
  Defined.

  (** * 6. Pseudofunctor laws *)
  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
τ = θ

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
τ = θ

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g)
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
τ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g =
θ • local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
is_invertible_2cell
  (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell g)

      apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F τ) =
local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell f
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (## F θ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f, g: B₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ, θ: f ==> g
p: ## F τ = ## F θ
## F τ = ## F θ

    exact p.
  Qed.

  Opaque local_equivalence_inv_onecell
    local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
    local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
    local_equivalence_inv_twocell.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ)
• local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₂ =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₁
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ)

local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₁
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ)
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
     ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₂)
       • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
          ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂) ^-1))

          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂))
   • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell
   ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₁)
     • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
        ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁) ^-1))
    • psfunctor_comp F
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁))
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
       · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)) ^-1)
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
## F
  (local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ)
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
           ▹ g₂)
          • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂)
               ^-1))
         • psfunctor_comp F
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂))
      • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
            · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1)) =
## F
  ((local_equivalence_inv_twocell
      ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
         ▹ g₁)
        • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
           ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁)
             ^-1))
       • psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁))
    • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)) ^-1)
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
## F (local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ))
• (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
           ▹ g₂)
          • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂)
               ^-1))
         • psfunctor_comp F
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)))
   • ## F
       (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1) =
(## F
   (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
      ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
         ▹ g₁)
        • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
           ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁)
             ^-1))
       • psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)))
 • ## F
     (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)) ^-1)
• ## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
     ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₁) • (f ◃ τ))
 • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)) ^-1)
• (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)
     • ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
          ▹ g₂)
         • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
            ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂)
              ^-1))
        • psfunctor_comp F
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)))
    • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
         (# F
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
             · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂))) ^-1)
   • ## F
       (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1) =
(((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₁)
   • ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₁)
       • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
          ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁) ^-1))
      • psfunctor_comp F
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)))
  • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
       (# F
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁))) ^-1)
 • ## F
     (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)) ^-1)
• ## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
     ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₁)
• ((f ◃ τ)
   • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)) ^-1
      • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)
         • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
             ▹ g₂)
            • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     g₂) ^-1)
               • (psfunctor_comp F
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)
                  • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                        (# F
                           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              f
                            · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                                g₂))) ^-1
                     • ## F
                         (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                               f
                             · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                                 g₂)) ^-1))))))) =
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₁)
• (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₁)
   • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
       ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁) ^-1)
      • (psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)
         • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
               (# F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                   · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)))
            ^-1
            • (## F
                 (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                     · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                         g₁)) ^-1
               • ## F
                   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
(f ◃ τ)
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)
      • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
          ▹ g₂)
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂)
               ^-1)
            • (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)
               • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     (# F
                        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                           f
                         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                             g₂))) ^-1
                  • ## F
                      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                            f
                          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              g₂)) ^-1)))))) =
((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₁)
• ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁) ^-1)
   • (psfunctor_comp F
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)
      • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (# F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁)))
         ^-1
         • (## F
              (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                  · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₁))
              ^-1
            • ## F
                (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
                 ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
(f ◃ τ)
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · g₂)
      • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1
          ▹ g₂)
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₂)
               ^-1)
            • (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)
               • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     (# F
                        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                           f
                         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                             g₂))) ^-1
                  • ## F
                      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                            f
                          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              g₂)) ^-1)))))) = ?b

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1 ▹ g₁)
• ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g₁) ^-1)

                 ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)))))

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1 =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
      · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g₂)) ^-1

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₁
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₂) ^-1

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =

    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₂) ^-1

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =

• id₂ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (f · g₂))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =

    apply idpath.

 ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₁)) ^-1
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ)
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₂) ^-1)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
g₁, g₂: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
τ: g₁ ==> g₂
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (f ◃ τ) =
((is_invertible_2cell_inv
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₁)) ^-1
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g₂) ^-1

    apply local_equivalence_twocell_lwhisker_alt.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g)
• local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₂ g =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g)
• local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₂ g =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g)
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
     ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1 ▹ g)
       • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
          ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1))
      • psfunctor_comp F
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
   • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell
   ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1 ▹ g)
     • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
        ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1))
    • psfunctor_comp F
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
       · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1)
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
## F
  (local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g)
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
           ▹ g)
          • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
               ^-1))
         • psfunctor_comp F
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
      • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
            · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1)) =
## F
  ((local_equivalence_inv_twocell
      ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1
         ▹ g)
        • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
           ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1))
       • psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
    • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1)
   • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
      ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
## F (local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g))
• (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
           ▹ g)
          • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)

   • ## F
       (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell

           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1) =
(## F
   (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
      ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1
         ▹ g)
        • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
           ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1))
       • psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
 • ## F
     (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1)
• ## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
     ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₁ · g) • (τ ▹ g))
 • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)) ^-1)
• (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)
     • ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
          ▹ g)
         • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
            ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
              ^-1))
        • psfunctor_comp F
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
    • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
         (# F
            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
             · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))) ^-1)
   • ## F
       (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1) =
(((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₁ · g)
   • ((((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1 ▹ g)
       • (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
          ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1))
      • psfunctor_comp F
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
  • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
       (# F
          (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
           · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))) ^-1)
 • ## F
     (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1)
• ## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
     ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₁ · g)
• ((τ ▹ g)
   • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)) ^-1
      • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)
         • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂)
             ^-1 ▹ g)
            • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
                ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
                  ^-1)
               • (psfunctor_comp F
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
                  • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                        (# F
                           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              f₂
                            · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                                g))) ^-1
                     • ## F
                         (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                            (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                               f₂
                             · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                                 g)) ^-1))))))) =
local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₁ · g)
• (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1 ▹ g)
   • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
       ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1)
      • (psfunctor_comp F
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
         • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
               (# F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                   · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
            ^-1
            • (## F
                 (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                     · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
                 ^-1
               • ## F
                   (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
                    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(τ ▹ g)
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)
      • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
          ▹ g)
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
               ^-1)
            • (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
               • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     (# F
                        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                           f₂
                         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                             g))) ^-1
                  • ## F
                      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                            f₂
                          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              g)) ^-1)))))) =
((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1 ▹ g)
• ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
    ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1)
   • (psfunctor_comp F
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
      • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (# F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
         ^-1
         • (## F
              (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                  · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
              ^-1
            • ## F
                (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
                 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(τ ▹ g)
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)
      • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
          ▹ g)
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
               ^-1)
            • (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
               • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     (# F
                        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                           f₂
                         · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                             g))) ^-1
                  • ## F
                      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                            f₂
                          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                              g)) ^-1)))))) = ?b
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
?b =
((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₁) ^-1 ▹ g)
• ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
    ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g) ^-1)
   • (psfunctor_comp F
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁)
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
      • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (# F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))
         ^-1
         • (## F
              (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
                  · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
              ^-1
            • ## F
                (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
                 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)))))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(τ ▹ g)
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)) ^-1
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f₂ · g)
      • (((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f₂) ^-1
          ▹ g)
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
             ◃ (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell g)
               ^-1)
            • (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
               • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                     (# F
                        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell

                              g)) ^-1)))))) = ?b

   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₁
    · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1
• (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
   ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
      ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
      · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1 =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (## F
     (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
      ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
• (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f₂
      · local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)) ^-1

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g) =
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g
 • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₂ g) ^-1

x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g) ^-1

(local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧

 ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
τ: f₁ ==> f₂
g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g) =
(is_invertible_2cell_inv
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g)) ^-1
• ((local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

x, y, z: B₁
f₁, f₂: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

g: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (τ ▹ g) =
((is_invertible_2cell_inv
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₁ g)) ^-1
 • (local_equivalence_inv_twocell τ
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell g))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f₂ g) ^-1

    apply local_equivalence_twocell_rwhisker_alt.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
lunitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
(((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id x) ^-1
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (id₁ (F x)) f)
   ^-1) • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
lunitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
(((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id x) ^-1
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (id₁ (F x)) f)
   ^-1) • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
lunitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
(((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ x)
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
       (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F x))
       · local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((pr2
            (psfunctor_comp F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                  (id₁ (F x)))
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))) ^-1
         • ((# F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                  (id₁ (F x)))
             ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)
            • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                 (id₁ (F x)) ▹ f)))))
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f)

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
## F (lunitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) =
## F
  ((((local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ x)
      • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
          (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
     ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F x))
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
       • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
           ((pr2
               (psfunctor_comp F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                     (id₁ (F x)))
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)))
            ^-1
            • ((# F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                     (id₁ (F x)))
                ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f)
               • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                    (id₁ (F x)) ▹ f)))))
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f))

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

  • ## F

       • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (id₁ (F x) · f)) ^-1)))
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x) · f)
    • lunitor f)
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1)

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁

(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x) · f))
^-1
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x) · f)
   • (lunitor f
      • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1)) =
?t2

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x) · f))
  ^-1

F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x))
 ▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
• (id₁ (F x)
   ◃ id₂ (# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))) =
?t2

      
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x))
 ▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
• id₂
    (id₁ (F x) · # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) =
?t2

      apply id2_right.
    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ x))
 ▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
• ((## F
      (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
         (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    ▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x))
      ▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))) =
(psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ x))
 • (## F
      (local_equivalence_inv_twocell
         (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1)
    • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F x))))
▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
(psfunctor_id F x) ^-1
▹ # F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂

x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

 • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F (id₁ x)))

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
id₂ (# F (id₁ x)) • (psfunctor_id F x) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_id F x) ^-1

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
• lunitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f)

     ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (id₁ (F x)) f)
   ^-1) • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lunitor f) =
?t2

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
((local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
  ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id y) ^-1)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (id₁ (F y)))
   ^-1) • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
((local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
  ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id y) ^-1)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (id₁ (F y)))
   ^-1) • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
((local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
  ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y)
     • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
         (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))
 • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
       · local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F y)))
    • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
        ((pr2
            (psfunctor_comp F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                  (id₁ (F y))))) ^-1
         • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
             ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                 (id₁ (F y)))
            • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f
               ▹ id₁ (F y))))))
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
## F (runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) =
## F
  (((local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
     ◃ (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y)
        • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
            (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))
    • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F y)))
       • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
           ((pr2
               (psfunctor_comp F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                     (id₁ (F y))))) ^-1
            • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                    (id₁ (F y)))
               • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f
                  ▹ id₁ (F y))))))
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

      ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y))

        ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell
            (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))
    • (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F y)))
       • local_equivalence_inv_twocell
           ((pr2
               (psfunctor_comp F
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                  (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                     (id₁ (F y))))) ^-1
            • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                    (id₁ (F y)))

                  ▹ id₁ (F y))))))
   • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧

((## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y))
  • ## F
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
       ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell
           (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))

    • ## F
        (local_equivalence_inv_twocell

• ## F (local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f))

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
## F (runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)) =
((## F
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
     ◃ local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y))
  • ## F
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
       ◃ local_equivalence_inv_twocell
           (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1))
 • (## F
      (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
          · local_equivalence_inv_onecell (id₁ (F y))))
    • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
          (# F
             (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
              · local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                  (id₁ (F y))))
        • ((pr2
              (psfunctor_comp F
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
                 (local_equivalence_inv_onecell
                    (id₁ (F y))))) ^-1
           • ((# F (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
               ◃ local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                   (id₁ (F y)))
              • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f
                 ▹ id₁ (F y)))))
       • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (f · id₁ (F y))) ^-1)))
• ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (f · id₁ (F y))
    • runitor f)
   • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell f) ^-1)

HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂

                        (f · id₁ (F y))) ^-1
                     • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                          (f · id₁ (F y))
                        • (runitor f
                           • (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
                                f) ^-1)))))))))

                          (f · id₁ (F y))

                                f) ^-1))))))))) =
## F (runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f))

   • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (id₁ (F y))) =
(psfunctor_id F y) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y))
• (local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F (id₁ y))
   • (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1) = (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(## F (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell (id₁ y))
 • local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell (# F (id₁ y)))
• (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 = (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
x, y: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
id₂ (# F (id₁ y)) • (psfunctor_id F y) ^-1 =
(psfunctor_id F y) ^-1

    apply id2_left.
  Qed.

f: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (id₁ (F y))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_id y))
• runitor (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (runitor f)

        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
      • ((local_equivalence_counit_inv2cell
            (# F
               (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g
                · local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)))
         ^-1
         • ## F
             (local_equivalence_unit_inv2cell
                (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g
                 · local_equivalence_inv_onecell h))
             ^-1))) = ?t2

B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g
    ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell h))
• rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)
 • local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h)

f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
local_equivalence_inv_twocell
  (rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h)
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h
    • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g
       ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell h))
   • rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)
 • local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h)

(local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)
 • local_equivalence_inv_twocell (lassociator f g h))
• ((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h
    • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g
       ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell h))
   • rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)

   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h)

   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h

   • id₂
       (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f

HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧

• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h) =
local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h)
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
   ◃ local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h)

    apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h) ^-1))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h)) ^-1 =
(((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g) ^-1
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h) ^-1)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)

  
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
   (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h) ^-1))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h)) ^-1 =
(((local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g) ^-1
  ▹ local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h) ^-1)
• local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g)))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h)))
^-1
• ((rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
    • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
       ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h) ^-1))
   • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h))
     ^-1) =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(((is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
        (is_invertible_2cell_inv
           (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g)))
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h)))
  ^-1
  • rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h))
 • (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f
    ◃ (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h) ^-1))
• (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h)) ^-1 =
local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)

    
B₁, B₂: bicat
HB₁: is_univalent_2_1 B₁
HB₂: is_univalent_2_1 B₂
F: psfunctor B₁ B₂
HF: local_equivalence HB₁ HB₂ F
w, x, y, z: B₁
f: B₂ ⟦ F w, F x ⟧
g: B₂ ⟦ F x, F y ⟧
h: B₂ ⟦ F y, F z ⟧
(is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
   (is_invertible_2cell_rwhisker
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h)
      (is_invertible_2cell_inv
         (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f g)))
   (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp (f · g) h)))
^-1
• rassociator (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell g)
    (local_equivalence_inv_onecell h) =
(local_equivalence_inv_twocell (rassociator f g h)
 • (is_invertible_2cell_inv
      (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp f (g · h)))
   ^-1)
• (is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker
     (local_equivalence_inv_onecell f)
     (is_invertible_2cell_inv
        (local_equivalence_inv_onecell_comp g h))) ^-1

    exact (local_equivalence_twocell_rassociator f g h).
  Qed.
End LocalEquivalencePseudoFunctoriality.
